cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Software Engineer (Data) role within the Ai & Data Platforms team at Apple. Your focus on building distributed systems that integrate open-source tools with internal ecosystems matches my experience building custom end-to-end data pipelines.

I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform for French Polynesia. It runs a daily scraper that collects 1,300+ property listings and feeds them into an AI agent that estimates prices from live market data. I also built an automated job search pipeline using n8n and an MCP server to handle data flow between different APIs. These projects required designing resilient systems where data collection and processing happen autonomously.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That is an 85% reduction in deployment time. I enjoy finding these kinds of bottlenecks and fixing them with better automation and cleaner code.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I would love to bring my experience in streamlining data workflows to help scale Apple's cloud analytics platforms.

Aodren Gloux
